mapper.insert: INSERT INTO acoustic_features (id, device_id, audio_clip_id, window_started_at, window_ended_at, average_decibels, peak_decibels, low_band_energy, mid_band_energy, high_band_energy, flow_confidence, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{deviceId}, #{audioClipId}, #{windowStartedAt}, #{windowEndedAt}, #{averageDecibels}, #{peakDecibels}, #{lowBandEnergy}, #{midBandEnergy}, #{highBandEnergy}, #{flowConfidence}, #{createdAt})

INSERT INTO acoustic_features (id, device_id, audio_clip_id, window_started_at, window_ended_at, average_decibels, peak_decibels, low_band_energy, mid_band_energy, high_band_energy, flow_confidence, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.deviceId}, #{item.audioClipId}, #{item.windowStartedAt}, #{item.windowEndedAt}, #{item.averageDecibels}, #{item.peakDecibels}, #{item.lowBandEnergy}, #{item.midBandEnergy}, #{item.highBandEnergy}, #{item.flowConfidence}, #{item.createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM acoustic_features WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND window_started_at >= #{startTime}
